subject: LXT 240402A: MASTER optical observations with AGN in error-box
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, P.Balanutsa (Lomonosov MSU), D.Buckley (SAAO), O.Gress, N.Budnev(ISU), K.Zhirkov, A.Kuznetsov,
G.Antipov, N.Tiurina,   E.Gorbovskoy, Ya.Kechin, D.Vlasenko, Yu.Tselik, I.Gorbunov,
V.Vladimirov,D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, A.Yudin,A.Chasovnikov, D.Cheryasov(Lomonosov MSU,SAI,PhysicsDepartment),
A.Sosnovskij (Crimean Astrophysical Observatory, RAS),
C.Francile.  F. Podesta, R.Podesta (Observatorio Astronomico Felix AguilarOAFA),
R. Rebolo, M. Serra(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),
A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov (Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),
A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov (Blagoveschensk Educational StateUniversity)

MASTER Global robotic net (http://observ.pereplet.ru Lipunov et al.,2010,Advances in Astronomy,2010,30L)
started  LXT 240402A (Xu et al. GCN 36016, Triggertime=2024-04-02 08:47:41UT, Notice=24/04/03 16:20:48;
Center R.A.,Dec. = 245.438 +25.800 +-1.5 arcmin; also detected by GECAM-C (GCN 36017 Wang-Chen Xue et al.))
observation at 2024-04-03 02:48:45 (optical observations also started by GWAC-F50A (Xin et al. GCN 36018))

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  located in South Africa was pointed to errorbox
64864 sec after trigger time at 2024-04-03 02:48:45 UT (by own observational program), with upper limit up to  19.3 mag.
The observations began at zenith distance = 60 deg. The sun  altitude  is -26.7 deg.

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope (Russia, Baikal)  was pointed  1 days 28326 sec after trigger time at 2024-04-03 16:39:47 UT, with upper limit up to  20.0 mag.
The observations began at zenith distance = 52 deg. The sun  altitude  is -33.1 deg.

MASTER-Amur robotic telescope  (Russia, Blagoveschensk) was pointed 1 days 28367 sec after trigger time at
2024-04-03 16:40:28 UT, with upper limit up to  19.0 mag.
The observations began at zenith distance = 37 deg. The sun  altitude  is -32.6 deg.

The analysis of LERG AGN (Comerford et al. 2020), locate in 75" frin the errir-box center) light curve in MASTER database will be continued.

The galactic latitude b = 43 deg., longitude l = 44 deg.

Real time updated cover map and possibly OT, that can be discovered, will be  available here:
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2413927

We obtain the following upper limits.
